message:
fix(e2e): update 5 compliance suites for evolved connector and E2E runner APIs

Adapt arxiv, figma, jira, mailchimp, and twilio compliance E2E tests
to match upstream API changes in fcp-core, fcp-conformance, and the
individual connector crates.

Figma adapter overhaul:
- Add InstanceId and CapabilityVerifier fields to FigmaConnectorAdapter
- Rewrite handshake to serialize/deserialize through JSON values to
  match connector's actual handle_handshake(Value) signature
- Map health() status strings to HealthSnapshot constructors: ready(),
  degraded(), error() instead of only healthy()/degraded()
- Rewrite simulate() to construct SimulateResponse from raw JSON
  fields (allowed, reason) instead of deserializing directly
- Add proper shutdown() that clears verifier and delegates
- Improve error message in delete_webhook capability denial test

Arxiv compliance:
- Switch log assertion from "invoke" operation context to "verify" phase
- Check dynamic.passed instead of reason_code for default deny validation

Jira, mailchimp, twilio:
- Add RiskLevel and SafetyTier imports for updated OperationInfo fields
- Expand introspect() from one-liner to full Introspection struct with
  all required fields (risk_level, safety_tier, idempotency, ai_hints)

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
